title: XRP Price Prediction: Can XRP Hit $1.50 If BTC Clears $85K?
description: XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) is trading at $1.40 after climbing 3% over the past week. But the rally is slowing as Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) got rejected at the 200-day moving average at $82,228. title: Canaccord Hikes Strategy Price Target to $224 as Bitcoin Roars Back Above $80K
description: Canaccord raised its price target on Strategy (NASDAQ:MSTR), formerly known as MicroStrategy, to $224 from $185, reiterating its Buy rating as Bitcoin (CRYPTO:BTC) pushed back above $80,000. The price target raised by Canaccord lands as MSTR stock has weathered another perceived storm in the crypto market. Bitcoin currently trades near $80,200, recovering from a $60,000 ...
